cam.name: Wyze Cam v4
cam.summary: 2K resolution, color night vision, indoor/outdoor use, and 14 days of free cloud storage. Impossible to beat at this price.
cam.fullReview:
The Wyze Cam v4 is the best value proposition in home security cameras, period. At $35.98, you get 2K QHD resolution (sharper than the Ring and Blink at higher price points), color night vision, and — the kicker — 14 days of free cloud storage with no subscription required.

The v4 is also IP65 weather resistant, meaning you can use it indoors or outdoors without buying a separate outdoor camera. The starlight sensor delivers impressive color night vision, and the 130-degree field of view covers most rooms easily.

Wyze includes free person detection (no subscription needed) and smoke/CO alarm detection. The Cam Plus subscription ($1.99/mo) adds vehicle, pet, and package detection plus full-length event videos instead of 12-second clips.

The app is the weakest link — it can be slow to load live views and occasionally drops connection. But for the price, these are minor annoyances. If you want the most camera for the least money, the Wyze Cam v4 is unbeatable.
